name: Checks multi-record batching for Zoho Leads upsertion. Demonstrates how the batch may split if it exceeds the max batch size (2).
fullName: test/integrations/component.test.ts#/home/runner/work/rudder-transformer/rudder-transformer/test/integrations/destinations/zoho/router/data.ts Tests zoho destination router -> Checks multi-record batching for Zoho Leads upsertion. Demonstrates how the batch may split if it exceeds the max batch size (2). $descriptionSuffix (index: 5)
description:
Feature: router
      Description: Checks multi-record batching for Zoho Leads upsertion. Demonstrates how the batch may split if it exceeds the max batch size (2).
      Success Criteria: All records are upserted in the correct batch group(s) with 200 responses for each batch.
      Scenario: Insert action with three records, verifying the first two are batched together and the third is in a separate batch.
      Test ID: router-1738307215532
      API Version: v0
